summary: Operations hub at /operation with mode-aware sub-tabs (4 seller / 3 affiliate), panel components, mock data + service layer; UI-only path avoids API client.

interfaceChanges.description: Role-based sub-tabs and panels via getOperationData service
web/src/lib/services/operation.ts branches isUiOnly mock vs empty stub

mappings.criterion: Seller mode shows 4 sub-tabs: Sản phẩm, Creator, Đơn hàng, Hoàn trả.
Affiliate mode shows 3 sub-tabs: Sản phẩm, Đơn hàng, Hoàn trả (no Creator tab).
Seller products tab shows GMV and ROI fields from mock data.
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operation_hub.test.tsx::shows GMV and ROI fields on products tab

mappings.criterion: With NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1, operations renders with mock data without API calls.
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operation_hub.test.tsx::loads operation data via service without calling api-client

recommendations: Manually smoke /operation in seller and affiliate modes with NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1.
